how.desc: AI gives you answers. Orchestra keeps the entire process.
how.step1_desc: Give each AI a job — cost, trends, evidence, risk. One right-click sends to all simultaneously
how.step2_desc: 4 AIs answer from their assigned angle. No API key needed — uses your existing browser sessions
how.step3_desc: All responses flow into Claude. Who said what, why that conclusion — organized into a single best answer
how.step4_desc: The full deliberation is saved in your browser. Search it later. Export as CSV/JSON anytime
how.role_claude_desc: Integrates all views, delivers the best answer
how.process_note: The entire process — who said what, why that conclusion was reached — is saved automatically. Search it tomorrow or a year from now.

privacy.desc: Orchestra has no server. That's not a limitation — it's a deliberate choice.
privacy.p1_desc: Logs are written only to your browser's IndexedDB. Orchestra has no server — external transmission is physically impossible.
privacy.p2_desc: Orchestra uses your existing browser sessions — the accounts you already use. We never store your credentials.
privacy.p3_desc: Remove the extension and all data disappears with it. No residue on any server.

pricing.desc: Begin for free. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.free_desc: Try it. Save and search without limits.
pricing.orch_desc: The core Orchestration engine. For users with existing AI access.
pricing.one_desc: Everything. No API key. Fully local. The complete Orchestra.
pricing.limited_note: Launch Edition is limited to 500 copies. After that, price returns to $10/mo.

faq.q1: What does "no API key required" mean?
faq.a1: Orchestra uses the browser sessions you already have — your ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, and Perplexity logins. You don't need to purchase API keys from OpenAI or Anthropic. It works with the accounts you already use every day.
faq.a2: All conversation logs are written only to your browser's IndexedDB. Orchestra has no server, no cloud storage, no database of its own — external transmission is physically impossible. Uninstall the extension and the data disappears with it.
faq.q3: Could my prompts be exposed when sent to each AI?
faq.a3:
Honestly: yes, in the same way as using those AI services directly. When Orchestra sends your prompt to ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, or Perplexity, that content reaches each company's servers.

Never send confidential business data, personal information, or unpublished work to any AI tool. What Orchestra protects you from is Orchestra itself — we have no server to collect your data.
faq.q4: How is this different from ChatHub or Sider?
faq.a4: ChatHub and Sider route your queries through their own servers before forwarding to AI services — your data enters a third-party database. Orchestra has no such relay. Your browser communicates directly with each AI. Also, ChatHub shows answers side by side for you to compare. Orchestra has Claude synthesize everything into one best response.
faq.q5: Is the 500-copy Launch Edition limit real?
faq.a5: Yes. Once 500 copies are sold, the Gumroad price switches to $10/mo and the listing changes to "Launch Edition sold out." Early buyers keep $8/mo for the life of their subscription.
faq.q6: What does the Free plan include?
faq.a6: Free includes conversation saving, search, and CSV/JSON export — forever, with no time limit. The 5 AI parallel Orchestration and Claude synthesis are available on Orchestra and Orchestra One. Start free, upgrade when you need parallel deliberation.

footer.note: Stored in your browser only · No external transmission · No tracking
